prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical fantasy anime illustration of a mysterious young male astrologer with tousled black hair and a deliberately shadowed, obscured face seated at an ornate cosmic divination table. He wears layered deep navy and black silk robes with flowing sleeves, gold embroidery, celestial patterns, delicate chains, tassels, and dangling jewel earrings, giving the clothing an elegant but smooth, not bulky, appearance. His left hand reaches forward to hover over a large glowing Earth-like glass planet, while his right hand is poised above the table as if controlling an orrery. The tabletop is a polished dark star-map surface covered with clean, crisp golden astrological circles, constellation lines, zodiac-like symbols, orbital rings, and fine geometric markings. Show exactly 7 visible luminous globe planets on or partly on the table: one dominant large globe beneath the left hand, one small globe at the far left edge, one medium globe near the center-right, one small globe behind it, one larger globe at the right edge, one large globe in the lower-right foreground, and one partially cropped globe in the lower-left foreground. The background is a vast blue cosmic chamber with stars, nebula clouds, aurora-like turquoise light, floating golden astrolabe rings, suspended chains, crystal ornaments, and a dragon-shaped celestial ornament on the right. Use dramatic blue and cyan rim lighting, sparkling highlights, transparent glass glow, intricate gold linework, deep shadows, cinematic depth, and an epic mystical atmosphere. Composition should be the same: character centered behind the table, upper body leaning forward, face area dark and unreadable, hands and glowing planets in the foreground, richly detailed but clean planetary drawings on the tabletop. luxury dark fantasy anime, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, vertical 3:4 aspect ratio.
